session.user:
Perform a bulk rename of `plan_store` → `pr_store` across the entire Python codebase.
This is a mechanical rename — replace every occurrence of the identifier `plan_store` with `pr_store` in all Python files.
This includes: - Field names: `plan_store: ManagedPrBackend` → `pr_store: ManagedPrBackend` - Keyword arguments: `plan_store=` → `pr_store=` - Attribute access: `.plan_store` → `.pr_store` - `self.plan_store` → `self.pr_store` - `ctx.plan_store` → `ctx.pr_store` - `context.plan_store` → `context.pr_store` - Any docstring mentions of `plan_store` → `pr_store`
Files that need updating (from grep output): - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/context.py` - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/objective_issues.py` - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_workflow.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/objective_helpers.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py` - `src/erk/core/context.py` - All test files under `tests/`
Use `replace_all=True` in each file to replace every occurrence.
Working directory is `/home/runner/work/erk/erk`.
Do NOT change any other identifiers - only `plan_store` → `pr_store`.

Perfect! The bulk rename has been completed successfully. Let me create a final summary:
## Summary
Successfully performed a bulk rename of `plan_store` → `pr_store` across the entire Python codebase.
### Results
- **Files modified**: 61 Python files - **Total replacements**: 401 occurrences renamed - **Verification**: No `plan_store` occurrences remain in Python files - **New occurrences**: 530 `pr_store` occurrences (includes pre-existing uses)
### Key Files Updated
**Core source files:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/context.py` (8 replacements) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/context.py` (3 replacements) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_workflow.py` (1 replacement) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/objective_issues.py` (1 replacement)
**CLI command files:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py` (2 replacements) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective_helpers.py` (2 replacements) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py` (2 replacements) - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py` (2 replacements) - And others (checkout_cmd, plan_cmd, close_cmd, dispatch_cmd, land_learn)
**Test files:** - 48 test files updated across `tests/unit/`, `tests/commands/`, and `tests/fakes/` - Includes updates to shared test context in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/tests/shared_context.py`
### Changes Made
All occurrences replaced: - Field names: `plan_store: ManagedPrBackend` → `pr_store: ManagedPrBackend` - Keyword arguments: `plan_store=` → `pr_store=` - Attribute access: `.plan_store` → `.pr_store` - `self.plan_store` → `self.pr_store` - `ctx.plan_store` → `ctx.pr_store` - `context.plan_store` → `context.pr_store` - Docstring mentions updated
The rename is complete and verified. All Python files have been successfully updated with no remaining `plan_store` references.
